variants.title: Filtrec RHR330AW40B Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR330AW40B3/AB1
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR330AW40B Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR330AW40B3/AB1
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR330AW40B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR330AW40B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
